# Tac UI

> Cross-platform design system with 39+ React components, design tokens, and icons.

## Quick Start

```bash
pnpm add @tac-ui/web @tac-ui/icon @tac-ui/tokens
```

```tsx
import { Button, Input, Card } from '@tac-ui/web';
import { Search, Star } from '@tac-ui/icon';
```

Wrap your app with `TacProvider` for theming:

```tsx
import { TacProvider } from '@tac-ui/web';

export default function App({ children }) {
  return <TacProvider>{children}</TacProvider>;
}
```

## Styling

- Tailwind CSS with `cn()` utility (clsx + tailwind-merge)
- CSS custom properties for tokens: `var(--point)`, `var(--border)`, etc.
- CVA (class-variance-authority) for component variants
- Add `tacPreset` to your Tailwind config: `presets: [tacPreset]`

```tsx
import { cn } from '@tac-ui/web';
import { tacPreset } from '@tac-ui/web/tailwind';
```

---

## Components

### Button

```tsx
<Button variant="primary" size="md">Click</Button>
<Button variant="point" leftIcon={<Star size={16} />}>Favorite</Button>
<Button variant="outline" size="sm" iconOnly><Search size={16} /></Button>
<Button variant="ghost" iconOnly><Search size={16} /></Button>
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| variant | `'primary' \| 'secondary' \| 'outline' \| 'ghost' \| 'point' \| 'destructive'` | `'primary'` |
| size | `'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg'` | `'md'` |
| iconOnly | `boolean` | `false` |
| leftIcon | `ReactNode` | - |
| rightIcon | `ReactNode` | - |
| disabled | `boolean` | `false` |

### Input

```tsx
<Input label="Email" placeholder="you@example.com" />
<Input inputSize="sm" placeholder="Small input" />
<Input error errorMessage="Required" leftIcon={<Search size={16} />} />
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| inputSize | `'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg'` | `'md'` |
| label | `string` | - |
| helperText | `string` | - |
| error | `boolean` | `false` |
| errorMessage | `string` | - |
| leftIcon | `ReactNode` | - |
| rightIcon | `ReactNode` | - |
| rightButton | `ReactNode` | - |

### Textarea

```tsx
<Textarea label="Message" placeholder="Type here..." />
<Textarea textareaSize="sm" placeholder="Small textarea" />
<Textarea error errorMessage="Too short" />
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| textareaSize | `'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg'` | `'md'` |
| label | `string` | - |
| helperText | `string` | - |
| error | `boolean` | `false` |
| errorMessage | `string` | - |

### Select

```tsx
<Select
  label="Country"
  options={[
    { value: 'us', label: 'United States' },
    { value: 'kr', label: 'South Korea' },
  ]}
  value={selected}
  onChange={setSelected}
/>
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| label | `string` | - |
| options | `{ value: string; label: string; disabled?: boolean }[]` | `[]` |
| value | `string` | - |
| onChange | `(value: string) => void` | - |
| placeholder | `string` | `'Select...'` |
| selectSize | `'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg'` | `'md'` |
| error | `boolean` | `false` |
| errorMessage | `string` | - |

### Combobox

```tsx
<Combobox
  options={[{ value: 'react', label: 'React' }, { value: 'vue', label: 'Vue' }]}
  value={value}
  onChange={setValue}
  placeholder="Search framework..."
/>
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| options | `{ value: string; label: string; disabled?: boolean }[]` | `[]` |
| value | `string` | - |
| onChange | `(value: string) => void` | - |
| placeholder | `string` | - |
| emptyText | `string` | `'No results found'` |

### Card

```tsx
<Card variant="default">
  <CardHeader>
    <CardTitle>Title</CardTitle>
    <CardDescription>Description</CardDescription>
  </CardHeader>
  <CardContent>Body content</CardContent>
  <CardFooter><Button size="sm">Action</Button></CardFooter>
</Card>

<Card interactive tilt variant="accent">Premium card</Card>
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| variant | `'default' \| 'accent' \| 'glass' \| 'flat'` | `'default'` |
| interactive | `boolean` | `false` |

Sub-components: `CardHeader`, `CardTitle`, `CardDescription`, `CardContent`, `CardFooter`

### MorphingCard

```tsx
<MorphingCard
  layoutId="demo"
  preview={<CardTitle>Project Alpha</CardTitle>}
  detail={
    <div>
      <CardTitle>Project Alpha</CardTitle>
      <CardDescription>Full project details shown in expanded overlay.</CardDescription>
      <Button size="sm">Get Started</Button>
    </div>
  }
/>
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| layoutId | `string` | - |
| expanded | `boolean` | `false` |
| onExpandedChange | `(expanded: boolean) => void` | - |
| preview | `React.ReactNode` | - |
| detail | `React.ReactNode` | - |

### Badge

```tsx
<Badge>Default</Badge>
<Badge variant="success">Active</Badge>
<Badge variant="glass" interactive>Click me</Badge>
<Badge count={5} />
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| variant | `'default' \| 'secondary' \| 'destructive' \| 'outline' \| 'success' \| 'error' \| 'warning' \| 'info' \| 'glass'` | `'default'` |
| interactive | `boolean` | `false` |
| count | `number` | - |

### Checkbox

```tsx
<Checkbox label="Accept terms" />
<Checkbox checked={checked} onChange={(e) => setChecked(e.target.checked)} />
<Checkbox indeterminate />
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| label | `string` | - |
| checked | `boolean` | - |
| defaultChecked | `boolean` | `false` |
| indeterminate | `boolean` | `false` |
| filled | `boolean` | `false` |
| disabled | `boolean` | `false` |

### Radio & RadioGroup

```tsx
<RadioGroup value={value} onValueChange={setValue}>
  <Radio radioValue="a" label="Option A" />
  <Radio radioValue="b" label="Option B" />
  <Radio radioValue="c" label="Option C" disabled />
</RadioGroup>
```

| Prop (RadioGroup) | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| value | `string` | - |
| defaultValue | `string` | - |
| onValueChange | `(value: string) => void` | - |

| Prop (Radio) | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| radioValue | `string` | required |
| label | `string` | - |
| disabled | `boolean` | `false` |

### Switch

```tsx
<Switch />
<Switch label="Dark Mode" defaultChecked />
<Switch checked={on} onChange={setOn} />
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| label | `string` | - |
| checked | `boolean` | - |
| defaultChecked | `boolean` | `false` |
| onChange | `(checked: boolean) => void` | - |
| disabled | `boolean` | `false` |

### AnimatedToggle

```tsx
<AnimatedToggle
  checked={dark}
  onChange={setDark}
  iconOn={<Moon size={14} />}
  iconOff={<Sun size={14} />}
/>
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| checked | `boolean` | `false` |
| onChange | `(checked: boolean) => void` | - |
| iconOn | `ReactNode` | - |
| iconOff | `ReactNode` | - |

### Slider

```tsx
<Slider defaultValue={50} min={0} max={100} />
<Slider label="Volume" showValue value={vol} onChange={(e) => setVol(+e.target.value)} />
<Slider filled={false} defaultValue={50} />
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| label | `string` | - |
| showValue | `boolean` | `false` |
| filled | `boolean` | `true` |
| min | `number` | `0` |
| max | `number` | `100` |
| step | `number` | `1` |
| value | `number` | - |
| defaultValue | `number` | - |
| disabled | `boolean` | `false` |

### SegmentController

```tsx
<SegmentController
  options={[
    { value: 'day', label: 'Day' },
    { value: 'week', label: 'Week' },
    { value: 'month', label: 'Month' },
  ]}
  value={period}
  onChange={setPeriod}
/>

<SegmentController options={opts} mode="multi" size="sm" collapsible />
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| options | `{ value: string; label: string; icon?: ReactNode; disabled?: boolean }[]` | required |
| mode | `'single' \| 'multi'` | `'single'` |
| value | `string \| string[]` | - |
| defaultValue | `string \| string[]` | - |
| onChange | `(value: string \| string[]) => void` | - |
| size | `'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg'` | `'md'` |
| fullWidth | `boolean` | `false` |
| collapsible | `boolean` | `false` |
| disabled | `boolean` | `false` |

### DatePicker

```tsx
<DatePicker label="Start date" value={date} onChange={setDate} />
<DatePicker mode="datetime" use24Hour />
<DatePicker mode="month" />
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| value | `Date \| null` | - |
| onChange | `(date: Date \| null) => void` | - |
| label | `string` | - |
| placeholder | `string` | `'Select date'` |
| mode | `'date' \| 'datetime' \| 'month'` | `'date'` |
| use24Hour | `boolean` | `true` |
| minuteStep | `number` | `1` |
| minDate | `Date` | - |
| maxDate | `Date` | - |
| error | `boolean` | `false` |
| errorMessage | `string` | - |

### ColorPicker

```tsx
<ColorPicker label="Brand color" value={color} onChange={setColor} />
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| value | `string` | - |
| onChange | `(color: string) => void` | - |
| label | `string` | - |
| disabled | `boolean` | `false` |

### Tabs

```tsx
<Tabs defaultValue="tab1" variant="underline">
  <TabsList>
    <TabTrigger value="tab1">General</TabTrigger>
    <TabTrigger value="tab2">Settings</TabTrigger>
  </TabsList>
  <TabContent value="tab1">General content</TabContent>
  <TabContent value="tab2">Settings content</TabContent>
</Tabs>
```

| Prop (Tabs) | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| value | `string` | - |
| defaultValue | `string` | `''` |
| onValueChange | `(value: string) => void` | - |
| variant | `'underline' \| 'pill' \| 'outline' \| 'icon'` | `'underline'` |

### Accordion

```tsx
<Accordion type="single" defaultValue="item-1">
  <AccordionItem value="item-1">
    <AccordionTrigger value="item-1">Section 1</AccordionTrigger>
    <AccordionContent value="item-1">Content 1</AccordionContent>
  </AccordionItem>
</Accordion>
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| type | `'single' \| 'multiple'` | `'single'` |
| defaultValue | `string \| string[]` | - |
| glass | `boolean` | `false` |
| outline | `boolean` | `true` |

### Dialog

```tsx
<Dialog open={open} onClose={() => setOpen(false)}>
  <DialogHeader>
    <DialogTitle>Confirm</DialogTitle>
    <DialogDescription>Are you sure?</DialogDescription>
  </DialogHeader>
  <DialogFooter>
    <Button variant="ghost" onClick={() => setOpen(false)}>Cancel</Button>
    <Button onClick={handleConfirm}>Confirm</Button>
  </DialogFooter>
</Dialog>
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| open | `boolean` | required |
| onClose | `() => void` | required |
| backdrop | `boolean` | `true` |
| layoutId | `string` | - |

Sub-components: `DialogHeader`, `DialogTitle`, `DialogDescription`, `DialogFooter`

### Modal

```tsx
<Modal open={open} onClose={() => setOpen(false)} size="md">
  <ModalHeader>
    <ModalTitle>Edit Profile</ModalTitle>
  </ModalHeader>
  <Input label="Name" />
  <ModalFooter>
    <Button>Save</Button>
  </ModalFooter>
</Modal>
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| open | `boolean` | required |
| onClose | `() => void` | required |
| size | `'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg' \| 'xl'` | `'md'` |
| backdrop | `boolean` | `true` |
| layoutId | `string` | - |

Sub-components: `ModalHeader`, `ModalIcon`, `ModalTitle`, `ModalDescription`, `ModalFooter`

### Drawer

```tsx
<Drawer open={open} onClose={() => setOpen(false)} side="right">
  <DrawerHeader>
    <DrawerTitle>Settings</DrawerTitle>
  </DrawerHeader>
  <DrawerBody>Content here</DrawerBody>
  <DrawerFooter><Button>Save</Button></DrawerFooter>
</Drawer>
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| open | `boolean` | required |
| onClose | `() => void` | required |
| side | `'left' \| 'right' \| 'top' \| 'bottom'` | `'right'` |
| backdrop | `boolean` | `true` |

Sub-components: `DrawerHeader`, `DrawerTitle`, `DrawerDescription`, `DrawerBody`, `DrawerFooter`

### Alert

```tsx
<Alert variant="success" icon={<CheckCircle size={16} />} dismissible>
  <AlertTitle>Saved</AlertTitle>
  <AlertDescription>Your changes have been saved.</AlertDescription>
</Alert>
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| variant | `'default' \| 'success' \| 'error' \| 'warning' \| 'info' \| 'glass'` | `'default'` |
| icon | `ReactNode` | - |
| dismissible | `boolean` | `false` |
| onDismiss | `() => void` | - |

### Toast

```tsx
// Wrap app with ToastProvider
<ToastProvider position="bottom-right" maxToasts={5}>
  <App />
</ToastProvider>

// Use in components
const { toast, dismiss, dismissAll } = useToast();
toast('Saved successfully', { variant: 'success', duration: 3000 });
toast('Error occurred', { variant: 'error', action: <Button size="sm">Retry</Button> });
```

| Option | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| variant | `'default' \| 'success' \| 'error' \| 'warning' \| 'info'` | `'default'` |
| duration | `number` (ms, 0 = no auto-dismiss) | `5000` |
| icon | `ReactNode` | - |
| action | `ReactNode` | - |

### Snackbar

```tsx
<Snackbar open={open} onClose={() => setOpen(false)} variant="success" icon={<Check size={16} />} action="Undo" onAction={handleUndo}>
  Item deleted
</Snackbar>
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| open | `boolean` | required |
| onClose | `() => void` | - |
| variant | `'default' \| 'success' \| 'error' \| 'warning' \| 'info'` | `'default'` |
| autoHideDuration | `number` (ms, 0 = no auto-dismiss) | `5000` |
| icon | `ReactNode` | - |
| action | `ReactNode` | - |
| onAction | `() => void` | - |
| closeLabel | `string` | `'Close'` |

### Dropdown

```tsx
<Dropdown trigger={<Button variant="outline">Menu</Button>} align="start">
  <DropdownItem onClick={handleEdit}>Edit</DropdownItem>
  <DropdownDivider />
  <DropdownItem destructive onClick={handleDelete}>Delete</DropdownItem>
</Dropdown>
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| trigger | `ReactNode` | required |
| open | `boolean` | - |
| onOpenChange | `(open: boolean) => void` | - |
| align | `'start' \| 'center' \| 'end'` | `'start'` |

Sub-components: `DropdownTitle`, `DropdownDivider`, `DropdownItem`, `DropdownSearch`

### Tooltip

```tsx
<Tooltip content="Save changes" placement="top">
  <Button iconOnly><Save size={16} /></Button>
</Tooltip>

<Tooltip content="Premium feature" description="Upgrade to unlock" placement="bottom">
  <Badge>Pro</Badge>
</Tooltip>
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| content | `ReactNode` | required |
| description | `string` | - |
| placement | `'top' \| 'bottom' \| 'left' \| 'right'` | `'top'` |
| delay | `number` (ms) | `200` |

### Popover

```tsx
<Popover trigger={<Button>Options</Button>} side="bottom" align="start">
  <PopoverHeader>Filter</PopoverHeader>
  <PopoverBody><Input placeholder="Search..." /></PopoverBody>
  <PopoverFooter><Button size="sm">Apply</Button></PopoverFooter>
</Popover>
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| trigger | `ReactNode` | required |
| open | `boolean` | - |
| onOpenChange | `(open: boolean) => void` | - |
| side | `'top' \| 'bottom' \| 'left' \| 'right'` | `'bottom'` |
| align | `'start' \| 'center' \| 'end'` | `'center'` |

### Avatar

```tsx
<Avatar src="/photo.jpg" alt="User" size="md" />
<Avatar initials="JH" size="lg" showStatus />
<Avatar icon={<User size={20} />} animated />
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| size | `'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg' \| 'xl'` | `'md'` |
| src | `string` | - |
| alt | `string` | - |
| initials | `string` | - |
| icon | `ReactNode` | - |
| showStatus | `boolean` | `false` |
| statusColor | `string` | `'var(--success)'` |
| animated | `boolean` | `false` |

### Chip

```tsx
<Chip variant="filter">Active</Chip>
<Chip variant="input" leftIcon={<Tag size={12} />} onDelete={() => {}}>React</Chip>
<Chip variant="glass">Premium</Chip>
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| variant | `'filter' \| 'assist' \| 'suggestion' \| 'input' \| 'glass'` | `'filter'` |
| leftIcon | `ReactNode` | - |
| onDelete | `() => void` | - |
| disabled | `boolean` | `false` |

### Progress

```tsx
<Progress value={75} />
<Progress value={60} variant="circular" size={80} showLabel />
<Progress value={40} barSize="lg" />
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| value | `number` | `0` |
| max | `number` | `100` |
| variant | `'linear' \| 'circular'` | `'linear'` |
| size | `number` | `64` |
| barSize | `'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg'` | `'md'` |
| showLabel | `boolean` | `false` |

### Table

```tsx
<Table>
  <TableHeader>
    <TableRow>
      <TableHead>Name</TableHead>
      <TableHead>Email</TableHead>
    </TableRow>
  </TableHeader>
  <TableBody>
    <TableRow>
      <TableCell>John</TableCell>
      <TableCell>john@example.com</TableCell>
    </TableRow>
  </TableBody>
</Table>
```

Sub-components: `Table`, `TableHeader`, `TableBody`, `TableFooter`, `TableRow`, `TableHead`, `TableCell`, `TableCaption`

### Breadcrumb

```tsx
<Breadcrumb>
  <BreadcrumbList>
    <BreadcrumbItem><BreadcrumbLink href="/">Home</BreadcrumbLink></BreadcrumbItem>
    <BreadcrumbSeparator />
    <BreadcrumbItem><BreadcrumbLink href="/docs">Docs</BreadcrumbLink></BreadcrumbItem>
  </BreadcrumbList>
</Breadcrumb>
```

### Pagination

```tsx
<Pagination>
  <PaginationContent>
    <PaginationPrevious onClick={prev} />
    <PaginationItem>1</PaginationItem>
    <PaginationItem>2</PaginationItem>
    <PaginationEllipsis />
    <PaginationItem>10</PaginationItem>
    <PaginationNext onClick={next} />
  </PaginationContent>
</Pagination>
```

### Stepper

```tsx
<Stepper activeStep={1} orientation="horizontal">
  <Step title="Account" description="Create account" />
  <Step title="Profile" description="Set up profile" />
  <Step title="Done" />
</Stepper>
```

| Prop (Stepper) | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| activeStep | `number` | `0` |
| orientation | `'horizontal' \| 'vertical'` | `'horizontal'` |
| alignLabels | `'edge' \| 'center'` | `'edge'` |

| Prop (Step) | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| title | `string` | required |
| description | `string` | - |
| icon | `ReactNode` | - |

### Divider

```tsx
<Divider />
<Divider variant="thick" />
<Divider variant="inset" />
<Divider label="OR" />
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| variant | `'full' \| 'inset' \| 'thick' \| 'withLabel'` | `'full'` |
| label | `string` | - |

### Skeleton

```tsx
<Skeleton variant="text" lines={3} />
<Skeleton variant="circular" width={48} height={48} />
<Skeleton variant="rectangular" width="100%" height={200} />
<Skeleton animation="pulse" width="100%" height={20} />
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| variant | `'rectangular' \| 'circular' \| 'text'` | `'rectangular'` |
| animation | `'shimmer' \| 'pulse'` | `'shimmer'` |
| width | `string \| number` | - |
| height | `string \| number` | - |
| lines | `number` (for text variant) | `3` |

### Indicator

```tsx
<Indicator variant="linear" />
<Indicator variant="circular" size={32} />
<Indicator variant="circular" size={48} color="var(--error)" />
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| variant | `'linear' \| 'circular'` | `'linear'` |
| size | `number` | `32` |
| color | `string` | `'var(--point)'` |

### CodeBlock

```tsx
<CodeBlock code={`const x = 1;`} language="typescript" showLineNumbers showCopyButton />
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| code | `string` | required |
| language | `string` | - |
| showLineNumbers | `boolean` | `false` |
| showCopyButton | `boolean` | `false` |

### EmptyState

```tsx
<EmptyState
  icon={<Inbox size={48} />}
  title="No items"
  description="Create your first item to get started."
  action={<Button>Create Item</Button>}
/>
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| icon | `ReactNode` | - |
| title | `string` | required |
| description | `string` | - |
| action | `ReactNode` | - |

### MorphingCard

```tsx
<MorphingCard
  layoutId="card-1"
  expanded={expanded}
  onExpandedChange={setExpanded}
  preview={<div>Compact view</div>}
  detail={<div>Expanded view with more content</div>}
/>
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| layoutId | `string` | required |
| expanded | `boolean` | - |
| onExpandedChange | `(expanded: boolean) => void` | - |
| preview | `ReactNode` | - |
| detail | `ReactNode` | - |

### VStack & HStack

```tsx
<VStack gap="md" align="center">
  <Input label="Name" />
  <Button>Submit</Button>
</VStack>

<HStack gap="sm" justify="between">
  <Badge>Tag 1</Badge>
  <Badge>Tag 2</Badge>
</HStack>
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| gap | `'none' \| 'xs' \| 'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg' \| 'xl' \| '2xl'` | `'md'` |
| align | `'start' \| 'center' \| 'end' \| 'stretch' \| 'baseline'` | VStack: `'stretch'`, HStack: `'center'` |
| justify | `'start' \| 'center' \| 'end' \| 'between' \| 'around' \| 'evenly'` | `'start'` |
| wrap | `boolean` | `false` |

---

## Charts

```tsx
import { BarChart, LineChart, PieChart, DonutChart } from '@tac-ui/web';
```

### BarChart

```tsx
<BarChart
  data={[{ label: 'Jan', value: 30 }, { label: 'Feb', value: 45 }]}
  height={200}
  showGrid
  showValues
/>
```

### LineChart

```tsx
<LineChart
  data={[{ label: 'Mon', value: 10 }, { label: 'Tue', value: 25 }]}
  height={200}
  showArea
  showDots
  color="var(--point)"
/>
```

### PieChart / DonutChart

```tsx
<PieChart
  data={[
    { label: 'A', value: 40, color: 'var(--chart-1)' },
    { label: 'B', value: 30, color: 'var(--chart-2)' },
  ]}
  size={200}
  showLabels
/>

<DonutChart data={data} size={200} strokeWidth={20} />
```

---

## Layout

```tsx
import {
  PageLayout, Header, Sidebar, SidebarGroup, SidebarItem,
  Main, Footer, Container, FloatingMenuBar, FloatingMenuItem,
} from '@tac-ui/web';
```

### Sidebar with groups

```tsx
<Sidebar width={240} collapsible collapsed={collapsed} onCollapse={setCollapsed} position="left" rounded>
  <SidebarGroup label="Navigation" icon={<Menu size={14} />} collapsible defaultOpen>
    <SidebarItem icon={<Home size={16} />} active>Dashboard</SidebarItem>
    <SidebarItem icon={<Settings size={16} />}>Settings</SidebarItem>
  </SidebarGroup>
</Sidebar>
```

### Header

```tsx
<Header sticky bordered blur autoHide>
  <Logo />
  <nav>...</nav>
</Header>
```

### Preset Page Layouts

```tsx
import { SidebarPage, DashboardPage, HolyGrailPage } from '@tac-ui/web';
```

Available: `SingleColumnPage`, `SidebarPage`, `GridPage`, `DashboardPage`, `SplitPage`, `StackedPage`, `DualSidebarPage`, `HolyGrailPage`, `AsymmetricPage`, `AppPage`

### FloatingMenuBar

```tsx
<FloatingMenuBar position="bottom-center" blur bordered>
  <FloatingMenuItem icon={<Home size={18} />} label="Home" active />
  <FloatingMenuItem icon={<Search size={18} />} label="Search" />
</FloatingMenuBar>
```

---

## Icons

```tsx
import { Search, Star, Check, X, ArrowRight, TacLogo } from '@tac-ui/icon';

<Search size={16} />
<TacLogo size={24} />
```

All [lucide-react](https://lucide.dev/icons) icons are re-exported from `@tac-ui/icon`, plus the custom `TacLogo`.

---

## Design Tokens

```tsx
import { primitiveColors, semanticTokens, spacing, typography, motion, diaSpring } from '@tac-ui/tokens';
```

### CSS Custom Properties

Colors: `--background`, `--foreground`, `--border`, `--card`, `--primary`, `--point`, `--muted-foreground`, `--success`, `--error`, `--warning`, `--info`

Spacing: `--spacing-2xs` through `--spacing-3xl`

Radius: `--radius-none`, `--radius-xs`, `--radius-sm`, `--radius-m`, `--radius-lg`, `--radius-xl`, `--radius-2xl`, `--radius-pill`

Shadows: `--shadow-sm`, `--shadow-m`, `--shadow-lg`, `--shadow-xl`

Motion: `--duration-instant` (80ms), `--duration-fast` (150ms), `--duration-normal` (220ms), `--duration-slow` (320ms), `--duration-complex` (450ms)

Easing: `--ease-standard`, `--ease-in`, `--ease-out`, `--ease-in-out`, `--ease-bounce`, `--ease-spring`

Z-Index: `--z-dropdown`, `--z-sticky`, `--z-overlay`, `--z-modal`, `--z-popover`, `--z-tooltip`, `--z-toast`

Charts: `--chart-1` through `--chart-8`

---

## Hooks

```tsx
import {
  useFocusTrap,     // Trap focus within element
  useFocusRestore,  // Restore focus on unmount
  useRovingIndex,   // Arrow key navigation
  useReducedMotion, // Check prefers-reduced-motion
  useTilt,          // Cursor-tracking 3D tilt
  useSpotlight,     // Spotlight reveal effect
  useSidebarContext // Get sidebar collapsed state
} from '@tac-ui/web';
```

---

## Theming

Tac UI supports light/dark themes via CSS custom properties and `TacProvider`:

```tsx
import { TacProvider, useTacTheme } from '@tac-ui/web';

function App() {
  return (
    <TacProvider defaultTheme="system">
      <MyApp />
    </TacProvider>
  );
}

function ThemeToggle() {
  const { preference, setPreference } = useTacTheme();
  // preference: 'light' | 'dark' | 'system'
}
```

Themes are applied via `data-theme` attribute on the root element. Use `data-no-bg-transition` attribute on elements that should not animate during theme changes.

---

## Tech Stack

- TypeScript (strict), React 18/19, Tailwind CSS 4
- Framer Motion for animations
- CVA + clsx + tailwind-merge for styling
- lucide-react for icons
- ES2020 target, dual CJS/ESM
